title: Gravity Guns
description: [ABANDONWARE] Adds gravity guns inspired by Half-Life 2.
body:
# This is abandonware. Feel free to fork this if you're so inclined, but I won't be working on this anytime soon. ![Environment: Required on both Client and Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-both-4caf50?style=flat-square) ![Mod loader: Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-Fabric-1976d2?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/png;base64,)
[![Requires Fabric API](https://i.imgur.com/Ol1Tcf8.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [![Requires GeckoLib](https://i.imgur.com/uJRh2EV.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)
**ADDITIONAL DEPENDENCIES:** [My custom fork of Rayon](https://github.com/pluiedev/Rayon/releases/download/v1.3.1/rayon-1.3.1.jar).
*Originally created for ModFest 1.17* **NOT SURVIVAL READY!** **Make sure to download all dependencies listed above!** Join my Discord server for support: [link](https://discord.gg/NeNfePzCx8)
Inspired by the classic Gravity Gun from Half-Life 2, this mods adds the eponymous weapon/tool, which can manipulate the gravity of blocks and entities within a region. (See demo video for more details.) **NOTE ON CONTROLS:** the controls *differ* from HL2 by a _lot_. Hold the use button (defaults to the right mouse button) to grab an object, and release it to throw the object. Sneak + Mouse Scroll to adjust the power/radius of the region.
